name: Liquidator 2: Welcome to Hell
short_description: Liquidator 2 is an action-packed, first person shooter game with large cinematic adventure components.
detailed_description:
Liquidator 2 is an action-packed, first person shooter game with large cinematic adventure components.

• Three unique game environments

• Massive fighting sequences

• Rich variety of characters & super charged power-ups

• Progressive character & story development

• Automatic gameplay adjustment system

Liquidator fills its encompassing alien worlds with suspense and intrigue making each gameplay experience totally unpredictable.

Prepare for battlel
